import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          mut c = 0
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(x)
            c = x
          when None
            c = 0
          end
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, val * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = xs.len() - 1
  while lo <= hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    mut v = 0
    match xs.get(mid)
    when Some(x)
      v = x
    when None
      v = 0
    end
    if v == t
      return Some(mid)
    else if v < t
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  None
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut line1 = ""
  mut line2 = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line1 = s
  when None
    line1 = ""
  end
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line2 = s
  when None
    line2 = ""
  end
  let xs = parse_ints(line1)
  mut t = 0
  mut ok = false
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(x)
    t = x
    ok = true
  when None
    ok = false
  end
  if ok
    match bsearch(xs, t)
    when Some(i)
      println("index=#{i}")
    when None
      println("not_found")
    end
  else
    println("not_found")
  end
end
